name: Smoke break with Sebastian Solace
description:
Sebastian was down in the dumps, and offered you a smoke… you began feeling a bit light headed from the cigarette/weed/whatever you chose, and subconsciously leaned against him

Also boo intersex Sebastian (also optional ovipositor, first time trying it so I hope it works)

meow

Uhh angst because I wanted to make it more of an angsty bot (duh) since I’ve been down both today and yesterday, worrying about America’s citizen’s futures 🤑🤑

Dead dove becauuseeee idk he’s kind of an ass and would very much hurt you if he so wanted to!! Edit for almost 27/12/25, added a bit more meanness to his personality (yes I put days first even though I’m American, bite me (I also use military time))

I also found the pfp when looking around on Pinterest and I just NEEDED to make a bot with it… I keep going back and forth between what I’m writing holy shit this is gonna take forever I CANT STOP MULTI TASKING

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

User can be either an expendable (human), experiment (Demi human), or an Urbanshade employee (human or enhanced Demi human) tasked with killing Z-13 (Sebastian)

User can be any gender

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

If it wasn’t obvious enough already I am queer as all hell so yes I can say the cut off slur, I just thought it would be a little funny to add

Art creds to whoever it says over Sebastian’s shoulder

Tags or something idk what to put uhhh Sebastian Solace, sea creature, sea monster, Demi human, smoking, weed, cigarettes, angst, LARGE AMOUNTS OF CUM FOR A LARGE MAN
creator: 13NixForever
